description_long: This object is a detailed miniature representation of a grand, ornate building with a richly decorated facade, featuring columns, arches, and sculptural reliefs. The front side displays a prominent central entrance flanked by intricate architectural details and what appears to be a fountain or plaza area in front. The structure is rendered in a single, pale material, giving it a monochromatic, stone-like appearance. The rear of the object is flat and unadorned, indicating it is meant to be viewed primarily from the front. The overall form is blocky with a stepped base, and the surface texture is rough, mimicking aged stone or plaster. There are no visible windows, signage, or interactive elements, and the object is solid and compact.
description: A small, ornate, pale model of a grand building with a richly detailed facade and a fountain-like base, resembling a classical stone structure.
description_view_0: The front view shows the highly detailed facade with columns, arches, and sculptural elements, as well as a fountain or plaza at the base.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the depth of the facade and the recessed plaza area, showing the three-dimensional relief of the architectural details.
description_view_2: The rear view is flat and featureless, with no architectural details, indicating the object is not meant to be viewed from this side.
description_view_3: This side angle reveals the thickness of the structure and the layered, stepped base, with some facade details visible along the edge.
